title: VETERANS HOUSING PROJECT - 211info
text: VETERAN SERVICES OFFICE VETERANS HOUSING PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable rental housing and case-managed transitional housing for military veterans and their families transitioning back to civilian life. 1870 W 11th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Veterans with a discharge other than dishonorable or General Court Martial, experiencing homelessness and those at risk of becoming homeless, and under 80% Lane County Average Median Income Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (458) 221-0718 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 743-7170 Main phone Main phone (458) 221-0718 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by rental DOCUMENTS: DD-214 LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on LTD bus line 40 and 41. Services: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Transitional Housing/Shelter * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VETERAN SERVICES OFFICE
